basic.title: Zombie Attack Survival
basic.description: A 3D zombie survival game Using python and open gl. Players navigate procedurally generated environments, battle waves of zombies with dynamic weapon mechanics.
key_achievements: Developed a dynamic 3D environment with procedural terrain & Implemented multiple camera modes (third-person and Free-fly)
Cannon with limited ammo & Bullet physics with boundary checks

dl_ml_research.title: Multi-Omics Sarcoma Subtype Classification
dl_ml_research.description: Designed and implemented a deep learning architecture for sarcoma subtype classification using multi-omics data.
key_achievements: Resolved critical issues in TCGA sarcoma datasets regarding severe class imbalance.
Optimized model for low sample sizes to achieve high f1-macro scores.

dl_ml_research.title: Music Data Clustering and Feature Extraction
dl_ml_research.description: Extracted audio features and applied unsupervised learning techniques to cluster music data.
key_achievements: Developed multiple VAE variants (Simple, Conv & Conditional) to learn latent representations for cross-language music clustering and Evaluated clusters using Silhouette, DBI, ARI, and visualized cluster with t-SNE.
Builtamulti-modal pipeline combining audio features Mel spectrograms with lyrics embeddings (Sentence-Transformers).

web_applications.title: SurveyHub
web_applications.stack: React 19 · Node.js · Express.js · MongoDB · JWT · Firebase Auth · TanStack Query v5 · BullMQ · Redis · Stripe · Gemini · OpenRouter · Framer Motion · Tailwind CSS · Vite
web_applications.description: A full-stack SaaS survey and community platform with AI-powered analytics, a credit-wallet monetization system, automated content moderation, and a community blog engine featuring nested comments and reactions.
key_achievements: Architected a resilient 3-provider AI fallback chain (Gemini → OpenRouter → OpenCode Zen) with key rotation and dynamic model selection, powering automated survey insight generation, AI chat sandbox, and pre-publish content moderation.

Designed a credit-wallet monetization layer integrated with Stripe Checkout (one-time sessions) and webhook fulfillment, featuring atomic credit deduction, payment deduplication guards, and role promotion on first purchase.

Engineered a factory-pattern RBAC middleware system with independently testable auth guards (verifyToken, verifyAdmin, verifySurveyor, verifyUser), banned-user detection at the DB layer, and fail-fast startup checks.
Built a BullMQ + Redis expiry pipeline that schedules survey deadlines as delayed jobs, auto-aggregates response statistics on expiry, and gracefully degrades when Redis is unavailable.

Implemented end-to-end data integrity with compound unique indexes, soft-delete recycle bin with data-retention rules, array-cap pre-save hooks, denormalized counts, and status lifecycle state machines.

Optimized frontend performance via React.lazy() code splitting, TanStack Query v5 optimistic updates with rollback, and an Axios interceptor that automates secure JWT injection and 401/403 global error handling.
web_applications.roadmap: Exploring WebSocket-based real-time collaboration for survey building and live response dashboards.

web_applications.title: BizNest
web_applications.stack: React · Node.js · Express.js · MongoDB · Mongoose · JWT · TanStack Query · Stripe
web_applications.description: A MERN-stack e-commerce marketplace with strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) supporting Customer, Seller, and Admin workflows.
key_achievements: Engineered a MERN-stack e-commerce marketplace with strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to support Customer, Seller, and Admin workflows.

Architected a decoupled React frontend utilizing the Facade pattern, encapsulating complex API and business logic within custom hooks, and applied an aggressive caching strategy via TanStack Query to drastically reduce redundant network requests.

Implemented a secure authentication and request flow using Axios interceptors for automated JWT injection and global error handling, while hardening the backend with Helmet.js and Express Rate Limiting to mitigate common web vulnerabilities.

Integrated the Stripe API for secure checkout flows, utilizing server-side price recalculation against database records to prevent client-side cart tampering and enforce data integrity during payment intents.
web_applications.roadmap: Implementing AI-based dynamic recommendations and a purchase guide.

web_applications.title: Grocery Hub
web_applications.description: A full-cycle grocery ordering system with a normalized relational database, built using PHP and MySQL.
key_achievements: Designed a normalized relational schema in MySQL covering products, orders, inventory, and user accounts, with foreign key constraints and indexed queries for data integrity.
Built a full-cycle ordering workflow in PHP — browse, cart, checkout, inventory decrement — using parameterized queries throughout to prevent SQL injection.

web_applications.title: Electronics E-Shop
web_applications.stack: React 18 · Node.js · Express.js · MongoDB · Firebase Auth · Tailwind CSS · DaisyUI · Vite
web_applications.description: A full-stack MERN e-commerce platform for electronics products featuring brand browsing, product listings, shopping cart, and user authentication. 100% hand-written code with zero AI assistance — built entirely during my MERN stack learning phase.
key_achievements: Architected the entire MERN stack application from scratch without any AI code generation, demonstrating deep understanding of React component lifecycle, Express.js routing, and MongoDB data modeling.
Implemented Firebase Authentication with email/password and Google OAuth, including automatic user registration on first sign-in and protected routes via a custom PrivateRoute component.
Built a responsive e-commerce UI with Tailwind CSS + DaisyUI featuring dark/light mode toggle, mobile hamburger navigation, product carousels (React Slick), and real-time cart updates.
Designed a RESTful API with Express.js and MongoDB native driver covering full CRUD operations for products, users, and brands with proper error handling and data validation.
Deployed a production-ready application with Firebase Hosting (frontend) and Vercel (backend), implementing environment-based configuration and CORS policies.
web_applications.roadmap: Potential enhancements: order management system, payment integration, inventory tracking, and admin dashboard.

web_applications.title: DevJunction
web_applications.stack: React 18 · Node.js · Express.js · MongoDB · Firebase Auth · JWT · Cookie Parser · Tailwind CSS · DaisyUI · Axios · Vite
web_applications.description: A full-stack MERN job marketplace platform where employers post opportunities and freelancers browse, bid, and manage projects across Web Development, Digital Marketing, and Graphics Design categories. 100% human-written code with zero AI assistance — built entirely during my MERN stack learning journey.
key_achievements: Architected a complete job marketplace from scratch without any AI code generation, implementing employer/freelancer workflows, job categorization, and a bid management system with status tracking (Pending, In Progress, Rejected, Complete).

Implemented secure JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies for session management, complementing Firebase Auth (email/password + Google OAuth) to demonstrate understanding of multiple authentication strategies.
Built a responsive tabbed navigation interface using React Tabs for browsing jobs by category, with protected routes via custom PrivateRoute component and loading states during async operations.
Designed a RESTful API with Express.js and MongoDB native driver featuring JWT token generation, cookie-based session handling, and CORS configuration for production deployment.
Developed role-based functionality enabling employers to post jobs and manage bids, while freelancers can browse opportunities, place bids, and track their bid statuses across a clean, intuitive UI.
web_applications.roadmap: Potential enhancements: real-time bid notifications, payment escrow system, freelancer profiles with portfolios, and admin dashboard for platform management.
